© 2026Zumiez
This Site Uses Cookies

Zumiez and our partners use cookies to keep our site running, personalize your experience, and help us understand site traffic. You control which cookies are used.

Opt-Out Request Honored

Cookie Preference Center

When you visit Zumiez, we and our partners may save info in your browser, small pieces of data known as “cookies”, so things like your cart, login, and preferences work smoothly. Cookies also help us personalize what you see and understand what's working well (or not) across the site. Most cookies don't identify you directly, but they do remember your settings and help us show more relevant content. Your privacy always matters to us, and you're in charge. Review each cookie category below, click a name to learn what it does, and set your preferences at any time. Essential cookies keep Zumiez working and can't be turned off. Turning off others may limit some features, but you can keep shopping.


Privacy Policy

Manage Your Cookie Settings

Essential

Always Active

These cookies power core functionality like staying logged in, keeping items in your cart, moving through checkout, and keeping things secure. They run when you use the site and shouldn’t be turned off because the site won’t function without them. These cookies don’t directly store personal information; they’re used to provide critical functionality.

Can not be turned off: The site can't run correctly (cart, checkout, login).

Functionality & Personalization

These cookies help Zumiez remember your choices—like store location and what you've browsed—so we can suggest products and content that fit you best, wherever you shop with us.

If disabled: You'll see more generic recommendations and your preferences won’t be saved.

Site Analytics & Improvement

These cookies help us see what's working so Zumiez runs faster and smoother. We track things like site speed, popular pages, and feature use—always using aggregated data, never storing direct personal details.

If disabled: We lose insights that help us improve your experience, but shopping still works.

Advertising & Shopping Ads

These cookies help Zumiez and our partners show you ads and product recommendations that fit your interests, and let us see if our campaigns are working—both on our site and around the web.

If disabled: You'll still see ads, but they'll be more random and less relevant to you.
